summary: Iteration 7 atmospheric refinement frontend tests passed. Verified new Positioning section (positioning-section, positioning-overline 'Aftercare is outdated.', positioning-headline 'Recovery is the new standard.'), WhySalvix pillars now show 01/02/03/04 numeric prefixes on each pillar-{0..3}, ArtistProgram renamed to 'Artist Partnership' with new heading 'A curated partnership for professional artists and studios.', simplified 7-field form (field-name/studio/city/instagram/email/website/notes) with old fields (years/style/why/honest-feedback/shipping) removed, CTA 'Apply for Partnership', Hero unchanged (INQUE / For the marked. / Biotech recovery skincare), Footer (site-footer, contact-email-link, contact-instagram) and Nav (nav-salvix/why/program/contact) intact. Validation: notes<20 chars triggers toast and does NOT submit. Valid 7-field payload successfully POSTs to /api/artist-applications (with mapping name→full_name, city→location, website→portfolio_url, notes wrapped into statement) and shows inquiry-success.
critical_code_review_comments: ArtistProgram.jsx submit catch block swallows server error details — consider surfacing server-side validation messages (e.g., 422) to user instead of generic 'Something went wrong.'
FORMSPREE env unset is treated as a no-op silently; consider logging an info-level message in dev for clarity.
Positioning.jsx and WhySalvix.jsx duplicate the same Spiral atmospheric pattern markup — could be factored into a small AtmosphericSpiral wrapper to reduce duplication.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 artist-application via the frontend form (TEST artist: test@example.com) hitting POST /api/artist-applications (backend persistence).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified end-to-end on preview URL. All new test IDs work: positioning-section, positioning-overline, positioning-headline, pillar-0..3 (with 01/02/03/04 prefixes in DOM), field-website, field-notes. Removed test IDs (field-years/style/why/honest-feedback/shipping) are correctly absent. ArtistProgram form submission flow OK (validation + happy path → inquiry-success). Formspree is MOCKED (env unset) — only INQUE backend endpoint is called.
